notes: It worked flawlessly on the same machine with kubuntu 25.10. With a fresh install of kubuntu 26.04 the above mentioned issue occurs, regardless of proton version (I tried them all, including GE). Also tried downgrading from Nvidia open 595 to 580 and 570 - no luck.
title: Windrose

notes:
Tried multiple versions, multiple tweaks (setting globalillumination to 1 in config, using proton cachyos with vk3d heap etc), nothing worked.

 Game just does not seem to work on current nvidia drivers 595.58.03 drivers. I've seen people mention it is limited to 5xxx series cards, but I don't know if that's true or not.

Note that if you launch for the first time on linux, your save might be corrupted - so if you dual-boot like me and switch over to windows to play, you'll configure the game to not sync with steam cloud -> delete the synced data -> start up the game and create your character -> quit and then activate steam cloud again and overwrite the cloud saved copy with your new local data.
title: Windrose
